data.days_before: Warning days: product is 'expiring' from here (orange)
data.days_critical: Critical days: product becomes urgent from here (red)
data.next_expiry_within: Show 'Next expiry' only if within these days
data.expired_within: Show expired products in the hero for this many days after expiry
data.sidebar_enabled: Show the pantry in the Home Assistant sidebar

error.critical_above_warning: Critical days cannot exceed warning days

options.expiry_valid: Expiring first, expired at the bottom
